__comment__: Volume 10 unified table ordered by physical scale: planck -> quantum -> nuclear -> biology -> chemistry -> materials -> stellar -> galactic -> astrophysics -> universal.
__audit_note__: REGRESSION MODE: Vol 10 lakes are disabled to match the 37-lake Vol 9 baseline.

planck_null.__note__: Synthetic floor marker. File exists but contains no real data.

q1_atomic_spectra.__source__: NIST Atomic Spectra Database - empirical spectral lines

q2_molecular_geometry.__scalar__: log(value + 1) / log(k_geo) - bond lengths (Ang) and angles (deg)

q3_molecular_vibration.__source__: NIST CCCBDB experimental vibrational frequencies - 19 molecules 77 modes

q4_nuclear.__source__: NNDC AME2020 nuclear binding energy per nucleon - 43 nuclides (fallback)
q4_nuclear.__prediction__: P21 - nuclear binding energies cluster below 12/pi quantum boundary
q4_nuclear.__note__: 43/43 below 12/pi confirmed in preview. Fe-56 peak stability at N~4.40.

q5_decay.__source__: IAEA NDS v0 CSV ground states - 3205 nuclides with half-life data
q5_decay.__prediction__: P27 sub-test - nuclear decay encodes sub-lattice 2D Zeta clock structure
q5_decay.__note__: 3205 records. 29.6% within 0.15 of integer N. Stable nuclides approach N~7.85 (near 8/pi=2.5465). Sovereign from q4_nuclear.

q8_ionisation.__source__: NIST ASD first ionisation energies - all 118 elements
q8_ionisation.__prediction__: Same-object atomic test - same elements as Q1 spectral, different attribute
q8_ionisation.__note__: 88/118 elements (74.6%) cluster at N=4. Noble gases cascade N~4.75-6.26. Sovereign from q1_atomic_spectra.

q9_c60.__source__: NIST CCCBDB + Dresselhaus et al. 1996 + Bethune et al. 1991 - C60 Buckminsterfullerene 46 symmetry-distinct vibrational modes (Ih point group)
q9_c60.__prediction__: P17 - modes cluster at quantum register 12/pi (scalar=3.8197)
q9_c60.__note__: Sovereign domain molecular_c60. NOT merged with q3. Ag(1) breathing mode scalar=3.8140, 0.006 from 12/pi.

b2_codon.__note__: Disabled - scalar design pending. Next: codon-anticodon delta_G kcal/mol from Turner RNA nearest-neighbor parameters.

b3_amino.__source__: PubChem 3D Conformer Database - 20 canonical L-amino acids, 157 conformers

b4_pdb_protein.__note__: VOL 10 DISABLED FOR VOL 9 REGRESSION TEST

t1_biological.__scalar__: log_dt - ln(cell cycle interval in minutes)
t1_biological.__source__: Spellman 1998 yeast cell cycle GEO data

t2_planetary.__source__: NOAA CO-OPS tide predictions, San Francisco - original Vol8 lake

t2b_atlantic.__source__: NOAA CO-OPS station 8638610 Sewells Point VA - Atlantic semi-diurnal 2014-2023
t2b_atlantic.__prediction__: P18 - tidal register universal across ocean basins

t2c_gulf.__source__: NOAA CO-OPS station 8771341 Galveston TX - Gulf diurnal 2014-2023
t2c_gulf.__prediction__: P18 - tidal register universal across ocean basins
t2c_gulf.__note__: 6927 records. Diurnal tidal regime. Gulf of Mexico.

t2d_pacific.__source__: NOAA CO-OPS station 1612340 Honolulu HI - Pacific open-ocean 2014-2023
t2d_pacific.__prediction__: P18 - tidal register universal across ocean basins
t2d_pacific.__note__: 6838 records. Open ocean Pacific, no coastal confinement.

t2g_indian.__source__: UHSLC ERDDAP station 174 Cochin India - Indian Ocean 2014-2023
t2g_indian.__prediction__: P18 - tidal register universal across ocean basins
t2g_indian.__note__: 4929 records. Cochin station 174 (Mumbai 99 decommissioned). Indian Ocean basin.

t3_stellar.__note__: HELD - mislabeled as stellar, source is CHIME FRB temporal. period_days=0 suspicious.

t4_cosmological.__scalar__: log(d_proxy + 1) / log(k_geo) - SDSS DR16 comoving distance (Mpc)

materials.__source__: Crystal and amorphous structure invariants, 33973 records
materials.__note__: Vol8 fix applied. Broken lake preserved on main branch for RCA documentation.

u1_usgs_san_andreas.__note__: VOL 10 DISABLED FOR VOL 9 REGRESSION TEST

u2_usgs_cascadia.__note__: VOL 10 DISABLED FOR VOL 9 REGRESSION TEST

u3_usgs_japan_trench.__note__: VOL 10 DISABLED FOR VOL 9 REGRESSION TEST

u4_usgs_anatolian.__note__: VOL 10 DISABLED FOR VOL 9 REGRESSION TEST

np1_orbital_periods.__note__: Null mirror for P1 - scrambled period assignments.

p2_orbital_radius.__source__: NASA Exoplanet Archive pscomppars, 5,843 planets, same objects as P1

p3_planet_mass.__scalar__: log(1 + pl_bmassj_Mj) / log(k_geo) - planet mass in Jupiter masses
p3_planet_mass.__source__: NASA Exoplanet Archive pscomppars, 6,127 planets, same objects as P1/P2
p3_planet_mass.__litmus__: stdev/span=0.209 BORDERLINE - hot Jupiter detection bias toward high mass

p4_ttv.__note__: VOL 10 DISABLED FOR VOL 9 REGRESSION TEST

s1_gaia_parallax.__source__: Gaia DR3 parallax, 2M stars, 4 sky quadrants, sector-normalized

s2_stellar_kinematics.__scalar__: log(v_perp + 1) / log(k_geo) - Gaia transverse velocity km/s
s2_stellar_kinematics.__source__: Gaia DR3 PHYSICAL lake, v_perp derived from proper motion + parallax, 1.8M stars

s3_gaia_luminosity.__scalar__: M_G = g_app - 5*log10(1000/parallax_mas) + 5; scalar = log(1 + abs(M_G - M_G_median)) / log(k_geo)
s3_gaia_luminosity.__source__: Gaia DR3 phot_g_mean_mag + parallax, 2,000,000 stars, same objects as S1/S2
s3_gaia_luminosity.__litmus__: stdev/span=0.201 BORDERLINE - main sequence clustering confirmed

s4_gaia_colour.__scalar__: log(1 + max(bp_rp, 0.01)) / log(k_geo) - Gaia BP-RP colour index
s4_gaia_colour.__source__: Gaia DR3 bp_rp, 1,979,697 stars (20,303 skipped - missing BP/RP), same objects as S1/S2/S3

k1_kepler_rotation.__source__: McQuillan+ 2014 ApJS 211 24 -- 64784 Kepler stellar rotation periods

k2_pulsar_periods.__source__: ATNF Pulsar Catalogue via VizieR (B/psr) -- 2527 pulsars

k3_solar_cycle.__source__: SIDC SILSO V2 fallback - 29 solar cycle interval minima 1700-2024
k3_solar_cycle.__prediction__: P26 - solar cycle intervals show N/pi harmonic structure - stellar egg timer
k3_solar_cycle.__note__: ALL 29 cycles at N=16. Scalar ~5.098, k_geo=5.093, deviation 0.03%. Solar cycle IS the kinematic primary tick.

h1_cern_lhc.__note__: VOL 10 DISABLED FOR VOL 9 REGRESSION TEST

g1_galaxy_kinematics.__scalar__: log(vdisp + 1) / log(k_geo) - SDSS galaxy velocity dispersions
g1_galaxy_kinematics.__source__: SDSS DR16 galaxies, 1.843M records, 4 sky quadrants, sector-normalized

frb_master.__disabled_reason__: Phoenix-fabricated. known_signatures field does not exist in real CHIME catalog.

frb_chime.__source__: CHIME FRB Catalog 2, 4636 events after exclusion filter

l1_gwtc.__source__: LIGO/Virgo GWTC-3 Abbott2023 PRX13-041039 - 83 binary merger ringdown frequencies
l1_gwtc.__prediction__: P19 - GW ringdown frequencies cluster at specific N register
l1_gwtc.__note__: 83 records. N range 7.77-12.59, bounded by quantum layer. Sovereign domain.

g2_wmap.__source__: NASA LAMBDA WMAP 9-year TT power spectrum embedded fallback - 83 key multipoles l=2 to l=1200
g2_wmap.__prediction__: P22 - CMB anisotropy couples to N/pi registers
g2_wmap.__note__: 83 records. 45/83 at N=8. First acoustic peak l=220 at scalar=2.668, N~8.38. N=8 dominant.

universal_closure.__note__: Synthetic ceiling marker. File exists but contains no real data.
